talents.description: Allows picking up Wood Debris by hand.
Every hit has a chance of destroying tree stumps and splitting trunks immediately.
Lowers the calorie cost of using related tool by 20 percent.
Increases the damage of related tools by 1.
Increases output of all charcoal recipes.
Increases craft speed for Carpentry skill recipes but also increases labor costs.
Reduce cost for Housing items and labor cost of Carpentry recipes.
Reduce costs for Lumber Blocks and labor cost of Carpentry recipes.
Reduce power consumption and labor cost of the Sawmill recipes.
Lumber resource reduction by 8% per level and Carpentry skill labor cost reduction by 8% per level.
Reduce resource cost for Housing  up to 12% + Reducing labor cost of all Carpentry recipes by 10%
Reduce power usage of the sawmill by 50% and reduce craft speed by 15%.
Increased crafting speed of all carpentry recipes by 100% increases labor cost by 15%.
Doubles the speed of related tables when alone.
Lowers the tier requirement of related tables by 0.2.(Only applies to claimed workstations)
Increases the tier requirement of tables by 0.2, but reduces the resources needed by 5 percent.(Only applies to claimed workstations)
Increases the crafting speed of identical tables when they share a room by 20 percent.
Reduces resource cost of Hardwood Composite Lumber.
Reduces all Composite recipe labor costs.
Increase crafting speed of the Advanced Carpentry Table  but also increases power consumption.
Reduces resource cost of Softwood Composite Lumber.
Reduce resource cost for Hardwood Composite Lumber (Birch, Ceiba, Oak) recipes by up to 50%. (10% per level)
Reduce resource cost for Softwood Composite Lumber (Cedar, Fir, Redwood) recipes by up to 50%. (10% per level)
Increased power usage of advanced carpentry table by 50% and increase craft speed by 100%.
Reduce labor cost of all composite recipes by 25%.
Reduces resource cost of Hull Planks per talent level.
Reduce resource cost of Hull Sheets per talent level.
Increases craft speed and reducing labor costs of ropes.
Increases craft speed and reducing labor costs of Shipwright Vehicles.

Reduce cost of Hull Planks

Increases craft speed for specific recipes.

15% Reduce cost to Pupusas & loaded taro fries

Baked veggies 30% craft speed increase
Baked meats 30% craft speed increase

Pastries - Resource Reduction 15% + 5% pies cost increase (Fritter, Donut, Muffin)

Reduce cost for Housing items.

Reduce cost for Housing tag items 25%
Reduce cost for Crafting tables by 15%
Reduce power consumption and labor costs of Industry crafting tables.
Reduce resource cost of Industry skill Parts and increases their Durability and Integrity per talent level.
Reduced resource cost of Industry recipes in the Robotic Assembly Line and increased crafting speed at the cost of significantly increased power cost per talent level.
Reduce resource cost of Vehicles but increases Labor costs.
Reduce resource cost of "vehicles" by 10% but increasing labor cost by 30% per level (max 4)
Reduce resource cost of parts recipes in Industry skill by 10% and increase durability + integrity by 25% (max 4)
Robotic Assembly Line recipes Cost -10%, craft speed + 100%, power cost +100%

Increased durability and integrity of parts per talent level.

Increases yields of grains when harvested by +1.
